      "muscleGroup": "shoulders",
      "equipment": "barbell",
      "difficulty": "intermediate",
      "instructions": ["Stand with feet shoulder-width apart", "Grip bar at shoulder width", "Press bar overhead until arms are fully extended", "Lower with control back to shoulders"],

    },
